TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pbuling(plkawtas), title = pbuling(plkawtas), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pbuling(plkawtas)} }

S.FORM: ḋgaga na pbuling/plkawtas Gaga' na 'tayal aring sraral ka ungat kwara' squliq kahul bbzlnah mwah sa rhzyal 'tayal na' ga, plpgun kwara' ga, musa' yaqu sun naha' Gaga' pbuling hnway ru Gaga' na smyus qani. Gaga' na gluw smyus qani hya' ga ini' ptnaq kwara' Gaga' na qutux qutux qalang. aring sqoyaw ru mwah tay gogan ruw kwara ka nyuw maki' hugal lga, kya kwara' qu Gaga' na smyus hya' la. nanu' qu Gaga' qani ga, niwan pinzimu' naha' sa kinlhangan na kinbkaysan naha' maha ulung laha qu mlahang kwara' pinbahuw naha' ru kwara' kinblayqan naha' mqyanux. Yalaw gi taqu s'usa' naha pngsa' sa kinbkaysan naha' ga, siki misan naha' kinluh sa kawas qasa ru musa' niwan na smqas na kinnqya' na kinluh naha' uzi qu sawn maha Gaga' na smyus qani uziy. nanu' zik balay ppslkawtas naha' ga, kya qu qalang taykuy hya' ga mutuw si ps'usa' smyus laha, iy qalang krahu' ka khmay cyuw mtqalang hya' ga, mutuw naha' spgluw musa' smyus. nanu' pnmnmawn naha' smi' qu s'usa' naha pngsa' Utux naha' ru s'usa' naha' qmuzi' sa qrqara' na lhlihang qu sni' naha' bbtakan taykuy, ruw splawa' naha kya qu kinbkaysan naha' la, tmasuq lga, mwah ngasal la, ga taqu mwah ngasal qasa ga, ini' balay pskraa qu 'nwahan qasa gi mutuw hluyun na Utux ma, nanu' mwah ngasal lga, aring kya qu mnbuw qwaw lru mpqaniq mami' kya uzi. gaga na pbuling hnway nanu' qu maki' tay qalang na pinsbkan ru tay Slamaw qasa hya' ga, ungat qu Gaga' na Pslkawtas laha' hya', ga maki' qu sawn naha' Gaga' na pbuling hnway laha'. ru mwah tay gluw na Mayklapay ru kwara' ka mks'iya' lga, psyurak sawn naha' kruma' ga paho sawn naha' kruma' qu Gaga' na smyus ka pslkawtas qani laha' hya' . nanu' qu Gaga' na pbuling hnway hya' ga, yalaw gi lawkah mtkzyay rhzyal kya tay pinsbakan ruw slamaw qani, nanu' yasa qu maki' qu gaga' na msina' qwalax tay sqasa hya', nanu' iy musa' pgaga' na pbuling hnway qani hya' ga, hazi' anan maki' qu sks'ang na Utux ru yasa qu ini' niya' biqiy qwalax maha inlungan naha' ruw yasa qu mutuw naha' hknyun qu ki'a cyux mquriq mrawi' mgluw mlikuy ini' ga knayril maha, ru mutuw naha' tqrgun maras syaw llyung, gi yasa aring sraral ga mutuw musa' pbuling hnway tay syaw llyung qu Gaga' naha' qasa, nanu' yasa balay pt'aring balay pgaga' lga, kyapun naha' qu wal mrawi' squliq qasa ru zqzyuqun naha' kska' qsya', ruw yasa sawbih balay pl'ax lga, shawh naha la, ruw aring kya qu pbuling sa hnway naha' Utux la. nanu' mwah qalang lga mwah mnbuw qwaw lru mplaw maniq kya la.

ḋgaga na pbuling/plkawtas Gaga' na 'tayal aring sraral ka ungat kwara' squliq kahul bbzlnah mwah sa rhzyal 'tayal na' ga, plpgun kwara' ga, musa' yaqu sun naha' Gaga' pbuling hnway ru Gaga' na smyus qani. Gaga' na gluw smyus qani hya' ga ini' ptnaq kwara' Gaga' na qutux qutux qalang. aring sqoyaw ru mwah tay gogan ruw kwara ka nyuw maki' hugal lga, kya kwara' qu Gaga' na smyus hya' la. nanu' qu Gaga' qani ga, niwan pinzimu' naha' sa kinlhangan na kinbkaysan naha' maha ulung laha qu mlahang kwara' pinbahuw naha' ru kwara' kinblayqan naha' mqyanux. Yalaw gi taqu s'usa' naha pngsa' sa kinbkaysan naha' ga, siki misan naha' kinluh sa kawas qasa ru musa' niwan na smqas na kinnqya' na kinluh naha' uzi qu sawn maha Gaga' na smyus qani uziy. nanu' zik balay ppslkawtas naha' ga, kya qu qalang taykuy hya' ga mutuw si ps'usa' smyus laha, iy qalang krahu' ka khmay cyuw mtqalang hya' ga, mutuw naha' spgluw musa' smyus. nanu' pnmnmawn naha' smi' qu s'usa' naha pngsa' Utux naha' ru s'usa' naha' qmuzi' sa qrqara' na lhlihang qu sni' naha' bbtakan taykuy, ruw splawa' naha kya qu kinbkaysan naha' la, tmasuq lga, mwah ngasal la, ga taqu mwah ngasal qasa ga, ini' balay pskraa qu 'nwahan qasa gi mutuw hluyun na Utux ma, nanu' mwah ngasal lga, aring kya qu mnbuw qwaw lru mpqaniq mami' kya uzi. gaga na pbuling hnway nanu' qu maki' tay qalang na pinsbkan ru tay Slamaw qasa hya' ga, ungat qu Gaga' na Pslkawtas laha' hya', ga maki' qu sawn naha' Gaga' na pbuling hnway laha'. ru mwah tay gluw na Mayklapay ru kwara' ka mks'iya' lga, psyurak sawn naha' kruma' ga paho sawn naha' kruma' qu Gaga' na smyus ka pslkawtas qani laha' hya' . nanu' qu Gaga' na pbuling hnway hya' ga, yalaw gi lawkah mtkzyay rhzyal kya tay pinsbakan ruw slamaw qani, nanu' yasa qu maki' qu gaga' na msina' qwalax tay sqasa hya', nanu' iy musa' pgaga' na pbuling hnway qani hya' ga, hazi' anan maki' qu sks'ang na Utux ru yasa qu ini' niya' biqiy qwalax maha inlungan naha' ruw yasa qu mutuw naha' hknyun qu ki'a cyux mquriq mrawi' mgluw mlikuy ini' ga knayril maha, ru mutuw naha' tqrgun maras syaw llyung, gi yasa aring sraral ga mutuw musa' pbuling hnway tay syaw llyung qu Gaga' naha' qasa, nanu' yasa balay pt'aring balay pgaga' lga, kyapun naha' qu wal mrawi' squliq qasa ru zqzyuqun naha' kska' qsya', ruw yasa sawbih balay pl'ax lga, shawh naha la, ruw aring kya qu pbuling sa hnway naha' Utux la. nanu' mwah qalang lga mwah mnbuw qwaw lru mplaw maniq kya la.
S.PHON: *ɣaɣa na pβuliŋ/plkawtas~ɕ ɣaɣaʔ na ʔtajal ariŋ s~ɕraral ka uŋat kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq kaħul ββzlnaħ mwaħ s~ɕa rħzjal ʔtajal naʔ ɣa, plpɣun kwaraʔ ɣa, mus~ɕaʔ jaqu s~ɕun naħaʔ ɣaɣaʔ pβuliŋ ħnwaj ru ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕmjus~ɕ qani. ɣaɣaʔ na ɣluw s~ɕmjus~ɕ qani ħjaʔ ɣa iniʔ ptnaq kwaraʔ ɣaɣaʔ na qutux qutux qalaŋ. ariŋ s~ɕqojaw ru mwaħ taj ɣoɣan ruw kwara ka njuw makiʔ ħuɣal lɣa, kja kwaraʔ qu ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕmjus~ɕ ħjaʔ la. nanuʔ qu ɣaɣaʔ qani ɣa, niwan pinzimuʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa kinlħaŋan na kinβkajs~ɕan naħaʔ maħa uluŋ laħa qu mlaħaŋ kwaraʔ pinβaħuw naħaʔ ru kwaraʔ kinβlajqan naħaʔ mqjanux. jalaw ɣi taqu s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ naħa pŋs~ɕaʔ s~ɕa kinβkajs~ɕan naħaʔ ɣa, s~ɕiki mis~ɕan naħaʔ kinluħ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ru mus~ɕaʔ niwan na s~ɕmqas~ɕ na kinnqjaʔ na kinluħ naħaʔ uzi qu s~ɕawn maħa ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕmjus~ɕ qani uzij. nanuʔ zik βalaj pps~ɕlkawtas~ɕ naħaʔ ɣa, kja qu qalaŋ tajkuj ħjaʔ ɣa mutuw s~ɕi ps~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmjus~ɕ laħa, ij qalaŋ kraħuʔ ka kħmaj ʦ~ʨjuw mtqalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa, mutuw naħaʔ s~ɕpɣluw mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmjus~ɕ. nanuʔ pnmnmawn naħaʔ s~ɕmiʔ qu s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ naħa pŋs~ɕaʔ utux naħaʔ ru s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ qmuziʔ s~ɕa qrqaraʔ na lħliħaŋ qu s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ ββtakan tajkuj, ruw s~ɕplawaʔ naħa kja qu kinβkajs~ɕan naħaʔ la, tmas~ɕuq lɣa, mwaħ ŋas~ɕal la, ɣa taqu mwaħ ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa ɣa, iniʔ βalaj ps~ɕkraa qu ʔnwaħan qas~ɕa ɣi mutuw ħlujun na utux ma, nanuʔ mwaħ ŋas~ɕal lɣa, ariŋ kja qu mnβuw qwaw lru mpqaniq mamiʔ kja uzi. ɣaɣa na pβuliŋ ħnwaj nanuʔ qu makiʔ taj qalaŋ na pins~ɕβkan ru taj s~ɕlamaw qas~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa, uŋat qu ɣaɣaʔ na ps~ɕlkawtas~ɕ laħaʔ ħjaʔ, ɣa makiʔ qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ ɣaɣaʔ na pβuliŋ ħnwaj laħaʔ. ru mwaħ taj ɣluw na majklapaj ru kwaraʔ ka mks~ɕʔijaʔ lɣa, ps~ɕjurak s~ɕawn naħaʔ krumaʔ ɣa paħo s~ɕawn naħaʔ krumaʔ qu ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕmjus~ɕ ka ps~ɕlkawtas~ɕ qani laħaʔ ħjaʔ . nanuʔ qu ɣaɣaʔ na pβuliŋ ħnwaj ħjaʔ ɣa, jalaw ɣi lawkaħ mtkzjaj rħzjal kja taj pins~ɕβakan ruw s~ɕlamaw qani, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu makiʔ qu ɣaɣaʔ na ms~ɕinaʔ qwalax taj s~ɕqas~ɕa ħjaʔ, nanuʔ ij mus~ɕaʔ pɣaɣaʔ na pβuliŋ ħnwaj qani ħjaʔ ɣa, ħaziʔ anan makiʔ qu s~ɕks~ɕʔaŋ na utux ru jas~ɕa qu iniʔ nijaʔ βiqij qwalax maħa inluŋan naħaʔ ruw jas~ɕa qu mutuw naħaʔ ħknjun qu kiʔa ʦ~ʨjux mquriq mrawiʔ mɣluw mlikuj iniʔ ɣa knajril maħa, ru mutuw naħaʔ tqrɣun maras~ɕ s~ɕjaw lljuŋ, ɣi jas~ɕa ariŋ s~ɕraral ɣa mutuw mus~ɕaʔ pβuliŋ ħnwaj taj s~ɕjaw lljuŋ qu ɣaɣaʔ naħaʔ qas~ɕa, nanuʔ jas~ɕa βalaj ptʔariŋ βalaj pɣaɣaʔ lɣa, kjapun naħaʔ qu wal mrawiʔ s~ɕquliq qas~ɕa ru zqzjuqun naħaʔ ks~ɕkaʔ qs~ɕjaʔ, ruw jas~ɕa s~ɕawβiħ βalaj plʔax lɣa, s~ɕħawħ naħa la, ruw ariŋ kja qu pβuliŋ s~ɕa ħnwaj naħaʔ utux la. nanuʔ mwaħ qalaŋ lɣa mwaħ mnβuw qwaw lru mplaw maniq kja la.
